query:
SELECT 
  'payroll_batch_items' as table_name, COUNT(*) as row_count FROM payroll_batch_items
UNION ALL
SELECT 'payroll_batches', COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batches
UNION ALL
SELECT 'worker_daily_finance', COUNT(*) FROM worker_daily_finance
UNION ALL
SELECT 'attendance_events', COUNT(*) FROM attendance_events
UNION ALL
SELECT 'pay_overrides', COUNT(*) FROM pay_overrides
UNION ALL
SELECT 'workers', COUNT(*) FROM workers
UNION ALL
SELECT 'group_shifts', COUNT(*) FROM group_shifts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'cost_centers', COUNT(*) FROM cost_centers;
